summary: Completed comprehensive testing of new features for Zektrix UK Competition Platform v2.0.0. All backend API tests passed (15/15). Frontend testing confirmed all new features working: Share API, Referral System, Analytics Dashboard, Social Sharing, and Romanian translations.

ui_bugs.issue: Console warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent
ui_bugs.note: Accessibility warning only, functionality works correctly

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/share/competition/{id} returns share URLs for social media
Backend: GET /api/share/competition/{id} returns 404 for invalid competition
Backend: GET /api/referral/validate/{code} returns 404 for invalid code
Backend: GET /api/referral/validate/{code} returns valid=true for valid code
Backend: GET /api/referral/my-code returns referral code and stats
Backend: GET /api/referral/my-referrals returns list of referrals
Backend: Referral endpoints require authentication
Backend: GET /api/admin/analytics returns comprehensive analytics data
Backend: Analytics endpoint requires admin authentication
Backend: Analytics endpoint rejects non-admin users (403)
Backend: API version is 2.0.0 with WebSocket support
Backend: Competitions list endpoint working
Backend: Winners list endpoint working
Backend: Admin login working with provided credentials
Frontend: Homepage loads in Romanian by default
Frontend: FAQ page displays translated content
Frontend: Terms page displays translated content
Frontend: Search Tickets page displays translated content
Frontend: Dashboard includes Referral tab with code display
Frontend: Referral page shows referral code (ZEK format)
Frontend: Referral page has social share buttons (Twitter, Facebook, WhatsApp)
Frontend: Admin page includes Analytics tab (Analize)
Frontend: Analytics dashboard displays all metrics (Revenue, Users, Tickets, etc.)
Frontend: Analytics dashboard shows Top Competitions list
Frontend: Analytics dashboard shows Revenue by Day chart
Frontend: Analytics dashboard shows User Growth chart
Frontend: Competition detail page has Share button (Distribuie)
Frontend: Share dialog opens with social media options
action_items: Add aria-describedby to ShareButton Dialog for accessibility compliance (LOW priority)
seed_data_creation: Created test users with referral codes for validation testing (TEST_ prefixed)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features tested and working: Share API returns social media URLs, Referral system validates codes and tracks referrals, Analytics dashboard shows comprehensive metrics including revenue, users, tickets, competitions, and referrals. WebSocket endpoints defined at /ws and /ws/competition/{id}. Email notifications via Resend are configured but in test mode.

feature_verification_summary.share_api: PASS - Returns title, share_url, share_text, twitter_url, facebook_url, whatsapp_url
feature_verification_summary.referral_validation: PASS - Validates codes, returns referrer username
feature_verification_summary.referral_my_code: PASS - Returns code, link, stats (total, completed, pending, earned)
feature_verification_summary.analytics_dashboard: PASS - Shows revenue, users, tickets, competitions, winners, referrals, charts
feature_verification_summary.dashboard_referral_tab: PASS - Shows referral code, link, social share buttons
feature_verification_summary.admin_analytics_tab: PASS - Full analytics dashboard with metrics and charts
feature_verification_summary.competition_share_button: PASS - Opens dialog with Twitter, Facebook, WhatsApp, Copy options

email_integration: Resend API configured (test mode - only sends to verified emails)
